prompt: Retrieve and compare applications APP-6687 and APP-9687; report each name, review date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Senior transit pass (APP-6687) only, set the review date to 2026-11-22. Leave APP-9687 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for APP-6687: set the review date to 2026-12-26, not 2026-11-22. The other application must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first review date.
Replace the superseded review date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both review date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected review date as current and the first requested review date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
